movie.overview: Marina's life is thrown into turmoil following the death of her partner. Mourning the loss of the man she loved, she finds herself under intense scrutiny from those with no regard for her privacy.
movie.tagline: My name is Marina Vidal. Do you have any problem with that?
movie.title: A Fantastic Woman
